item.title: 书格数字图书馆 昨天 07:48 来自 微博网页版 此《群仙图》册应由由清代宫廷画师绘制，为供内廷祝寿、雅玩之需。一函两册，各十二开（图十幅）。其内容仿照《列仙传》体例，描绘了二十个得道成仙的故事，始于：老子过函谷关。终于：王琼来乘青麟。每开左图青绿描金，右配释文。此套现藏于台北故宫博物院。介绍下载：网页链接 长图 +9 - 书格数字图书馆 - 微博

A CI/CD component builder's journey - GitLab Blog
Kubernetes: Get to know the container orchestration solution - GitLab Blog

What’s new in Git 2.46.0? Here are highlights of release contributions from GitLab's Git team and the wider Git community, including reference backend migration tooling and transactional symbolic reference updates. - GitLab Blog

GitLab receives Ally Technology Partner Award for Operational Excellence Financial firm recognizes GitLab for its ability to deliver lean, automated, and streamlined business models that drive simplified and resilient solutions for Ally and its customers. - GitLab Blog
Building a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for a monorepo the easy way - GitLab Blog
FAQ: GitLab CI/CD Catalog - GitLab Blog

How to stream logs through the GitLab Dashboard for Kubernetes In GitLab 17.2, users can now view Kubernetes pod and container logs directly via the GitLab UI. This tutorial shows how to use this new feature to simplify monitoring Kubernetes infrastructure. - GitLab Blog
New Scheduled Reports Generation tool simplifies value stream management - GitLab Blog
GitLab 17.1 Release - GitLab Blog

Develop C++ unit testing with Catch2, JUnit, and GitLab CI Learn how to set up, write, and automate C++ unit tests using Catch2 with GitLab CI/CD. See examples from a working air quality app project and AI-powered help from GitLab Duo. - GitLab Blog
Online retailer bol tackles growing compliance needs with GitLab - GitLab Blog
GitLab extends Omnibus package signing key expiration to 2025 - GitLab Blog
GitLab Support to require sign-in to create support tickets - GitLab Blog
GitLab now supports SHA256 repositories Try this experimental security feature to create test projects. - GitLab Blog
Mastering GitLab admin tasks with GitLab Duo Chat - GitLab Blog
How GitLab Agile planning improves collaborative project management - GitLab Blog
Get to know the GitLab Wiki for effective knowledge management - GitLab Blog

Best practices to set up organizational hierarchies that scale Learn how to model organizational hierarchy in GitLab. Create structures with clear lines of communication, strategic alignment, and more, while following Agile principles. - GitLab Blog

How GitLab helps meet NIS2 requirements The EU's NIS2 cybersecurity legislation focuses on resilience, incident response, and risk management. Learn how GitLab's DevSecOps platform helps meet these compliance requirements. - GitLab Blog
GitLab Patch Release: 17.3.1, 17.2.4, 17.1.6 Learn more about GitLab Patch Release: 17.3.1, 17.2.4, 17.1.6 for GitLab Community Edition (CE) and Enterprise Edition (EE). - GitLab Blog

GitLab named a Leader in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for AI Code Assistants In the first Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for this category, GitLab is recognized for its ability to execute and completeness of vision in AI code assistant technology. - GitLab Blog
Bulletin Board - GitLab Blog
Agile Planning - GitLab Blog

How to choose the right security scanning approach GitLab offers multiple scanning methods for CI/CD pipelines, including compliance frameworks and scan and pipeline execution policies. Learn the basics, configurations, and advantages/disadvantages. - GitLab Blog

Ultimate guide to migrating from AWS CodeCommit to GitLab Learn how to migrate from AWS Services to GitLab and seamlessly integrate with the DevSecOps platform in this comprehensive tutorial. - GitLab Blog

Refactor code into modern languages with AI-powered GitLab Duo This detailed tutorial helps developers use AI to modernize code by switching to a new programming language and gain knowledge about new features in the same language. - GitLab Blog

How Indeed transformed its CI platform with GitLab The world's #1 job site migrated thousands of projects to GitLab CI, boosting productivity and cutting costs. Learn the benefits they realized, including a 79% increase in daily pipelines. - GitLab Blog
